examples: His second wife, Alice, was determined to alienate him from his two boys.
Management jargon can alienate staff and leave bosses looking untrustworthy and weak, according to a survey commissioned by Investors in People.
But it can't afford to alienate its fan base.
It is a distortion of reality that can undermine our decisions and alienate our teams.
But modern art is just as likely to alienate ordinary people as to excite them.
